title: RESOURCE (FOSTER) PARENT SUPPORT AND RESOURCES - 211info
text: COOS AND CURRY FOSTER PARENTS ASSOCIATION RESOURCE (FOSTER) PARENT SUPPORT AND RESOURCES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides on-going support, advocacy, resources, and education for foster and adoptive parents, relative or guardianship caregivers and their families. There are opportunities to volunteer and donate. Confidential Address Eligibility: Resource (foster) and adoptive parents, relative or guardianship caregivers Hours: Not applicable Email (541) 901-3317 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 901-3317 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Coos and Curry Counties Services: Adoption and Foster/Kinship Care Support Groups Specialized Information and Referral * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COOS AND CURRY FOSTER PARENTS ASSOCIATION
